raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A majority of credit agencies do not offer the service of allowing parents or guardians to freeze a credit report for minor children.",
    "AB 1553 will make it mandatory for all credit agencies in California to help parents and guardians freeze a credit report for their children.",
    "10.2% of children have had someone else using their Social Security number, according to a recent report by Carnegie Mellon’s CyLab.",
    "The rate of identity theft in children is 51 times higher than the 0.2% rate for adults in the same population.",
    "Identity thieves target children because they have clean credit reports and are less likely to discover fraudulent use of their identities.",
    "Freezing a credit report is one of the most effective ways to prevent identity theft.",
    "A person must have a credit report in order to freeze it, and most children do not have one."
  ]
}
```
